failedAssertions.reason: The scaffold includes messages.jsonl, but the repository does not contain the mission-orchestrator skill instructions specifying the messages.jsonl write format with timestamp, sender, type, and content fields.
The agents/ directory contains no .md agent definition files, so required frontmatter and valid tool-name checks cannot pass.

The real /mission-status user flow did not reliably display the specified status output; explicit-ID output omitted current milestone, and no-arg status returned an explanation about a missing cli.ts instead of mission state.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for the gemini-cli-extension surface, including headless Gemini CLI usage, namespace isolation, and evidence expectations for mission-list/status checks.
